---
name: python-coding
description: 'Python coding skill for implementing new features, refactoring code, and maintaining Python projects.'
---

Use this skill when asked to write, refactor, or improve Python code in this repository.

Guidelines:
- Prefer idiomatic Python 3 patterns and maintain readability.
- Write simple, well-structured functions and classes.
- Keep changes minimal and focused unless the request explicitly asks for broad refactoring.
- Follow repository conventions and any existing project style.
- If code uses external libraries, update project metadata as needed.
- Include docstrings for new public functions or classes.
